name: Guerrera
summary: One of the three men of the landing party swept up by the flabby claws before anybody turned, with Donovan and Angstrom.
description:
Guerrera was of the party overtaken on the risen island: one of the three men swept up by the flabby claws before anybody turned, with Donovan and Angstrom.

Of the three the record says only: God rest them, if there be any rest in the universe.
fate: Swept up by the flabby claws, with Donovan and Angstrom.

sources.quote: Three men were swept up by the flabby claws before anybody turned. God rest them, if there be any rest in the universe. They were Donovan, Guerrera and Angstrom.
sources.context: Chapter 3, The Madness from the Sea
